creator: hirner@bitfire.at
text:
New TeamSpeak 3 FreeBSD server x86/amd64 version 3.0.7 from origin

--- ts3.diff begins here ---
diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile ./Makefile
--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile	2012-11-17 06:54:45.000000000 +0100
+++ ./Makefile	2013-03-05 14:31:18.468053166 +0100
@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD: ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile,v 1.26 2012/11/17 05:54:45 svnexp Exp $
 
 PORTNAME=	teamspeak3-server
-PORTVERSION=	3.0.6.1
+PORTVERSION=	3.0.7
 PORTEPOCH=	1
 CATEGORIES=	audio net
 MASTER_SITES=	http://teamspeak.gameserver.gamed.de/ts3/releases/${PORTVERSION}/ \
diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo ./distinfo
--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo	2012-09-26 02:59:07.000000000 +0200
+++ ./distinfo	2013-03-05 14:33:28.690718953 +0100
@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 4058885
-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 166aa64ed5a520d6002855f0a65d8b5a2f09fc4302866c8265a0f7a33fa9ea83
-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 4565427
-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 6fc07afcfdaa9a8ab89ad3b03682a4f4ebf04aa18eb6cc4043b89f88389bfe84
+SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 4396745
+SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.tar.gz) = ed680e152b10f84bf4b59ff177eb7d0c7567fc549b9f5d957bc73a456a79a64d
+SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 4887041
+SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 016daa5f33a5089aefc5a3cb11ed89b4540f43a561c96badeca6df3d86168b33
diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist ./pkg-plist
--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist	2012-09-26 02:59:07.000000000 +0200
+++ ./pkg-plist	2013-03-05 14:41:34.801388612 +0100
@@ -246,6 +246,7 @@
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_18.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_19.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_20.sql
+share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_21.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_database_version.sql
 share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_permissions_12.sql
 @dirrm share/teamspeak/server/sql/create_mysql
diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/ts3.diff ./ts3.diff
--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/ts3.diff	1970-01-01 01:00:00.000000000 +0100
+++ ./ts3.diff	2013-03-05 14:54:04.676026688 +0100
@@ -0,0 +1,35 @@
+diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile ./Makefile
+--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile	2012-11-17 06:54:45.000000000 +0100
++++ ./Makefile	2013-03-05 14:31:18.468053166 +0100
+@@ -2,7 +2,7 @@
+ # $FreeBSD: ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/Makefile,v 1.26 2012/11/17 05:54:45 svnexp Exp $
+ 
+ PORTNAME=	teamspeak3-server
+-PORTVERSION=	3.0.6.1
++PORTVERSION=	3.0.7
+ PORTEPOCH=	1
+ CATEGORIES=	audio net
+ MASTER_SITES=	http://teamspeak.gameserver.gamed.de/ts3/releases/${PORTVERSION}/ \
+diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo ./distinfo
+--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/distinfo	2012-09-26 02:59:07.000000000 +0200
++++ ./distinfo	2013-03-05 14:33:28.690718953 +0100
+@@ -1,4 +1,4 @@
+-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 4058885
+-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 166aa64ed5a520d6002855f0a65d8b5a2f09fc4302866c8265a0f7a33fa9ea83
+-SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 4565427
+-SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.6.1.tar.gz) = 6fc07afcfdaa9a8ab89ad3b03682a4f4ebf04aa18eb6cc4043b89f88389bfe84
++SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 4396745
++SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-amd64-3.0.7.tar.gz) = ed680e152b10f84bf4b59ff177eb7d0c7567fc549b9f5d957bc73a456a79a64d
++SIZE (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 4887041
++SHA256 (teamspeak3-server_freebsd-x86-3.0.7.tar.gz) = 016daa5f33a5089aefc5a3cb11ed89b4540f43a561c96badeca6df3d86168b33
+diff -ruN /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist ./pkg-plist
+--- /usr/ports/audio/teamspeak3-server/pkg-plist	2012-09-26 02:59:07.000000000 +0200
++++ ./pkg-plist	2013-03-05 14:41:34.801388612 +0100
+@@ -246,6 +246,7 @@
+ share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_18.sql
+ share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_19.sql
+ share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_20.sql
++share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_21.sql
+ share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_database_version.sql
+ share/teamspeak/server/sql/update_permissions_12.sql
+ @dirrm share/teamspeak/server/sql/create_mysql
--- ts3.diff ends here ---
